title: Our Team
text:
Professor of Forest Management Email | ResearchGate
Welcome! I am an Assistant Professor at the École de foresterie, Université de Moncton (Edmundston). My research focuses on understanding how climate change is reshaping forests, with an emphasis on landscape-level forest management, spatial analytics, and data-driven modeling. I develop and apply tools to quantify climate impacts and support adaptive management strategies for resilient forest ecosystems across North America.

title: Climate Change and Forest Ecosystems Lab
text:
Welcome to the Climate Change and Forest Ecosystems Lab. We are based at the École de Foresterie de l’Université de Moncton Campus d’Edmundston, where we bridge the gap between forest ecology and computational analytics.
Our mission is to quantify climate change impacts on forest ecosystems and develop adaptive management strategies that support the long-term sustainability of forest biomes across North America.
